name: Contraband Control Specialists
message: Contraband Control Specialists is a renowned private investigation and professional education consulting firm, widely recognized for its expertise in addressing "Drugs in the Workplace." As a California-based company, we have proudly established a robust client base and secured contracts in 42 states across the nation. Our dedicated professionals have successfully trained over 12,000 supervisors in the crucial skills of recognizing and addressing employee drug use and abuse.
